intentSynonyms: show me my purchases in bestbuy
see all my purchases in bestbuy
description: List purchase history from Best Buy. Returns all orders including in-store purchases and online orders. Each order includes order ID, channel (store/online), date, total amount, and line items with product details. Optionally filter by year (e.g., 2024). By default returns the past 3 years of purchases. Negative totals indicate returns.

year.description: Filter by year (e.g., 2024). Omit for past 3 years.
